summary: Comprehensive backend testing of Recuerda birthday reminder API. All 27 pytest tests passed (100%). Validated health, auth protection (401 without token), seeded-session auth, full Events CRUD with cascade-delete, SM-2 flashcard auto-creation/grading (Again/Good), calendar prompts (today/+7/+30 with festive flag and prompt_log dedupe), settings GET/PUT with defaults & bounds, and Pydantic input validation (day/month ge/le bounds).

minor.issue: Endpoint does not validate event 'type' against the allowed set (cumpleanos|aniversario|otro); any string is accepted. Consider Literal/Enum for stricter input validation.
Returns 200 instead of 201 Created on resource creation. Functional but not REST-idiomatic.

action_items: (Optional) Restrict event 'type' field with Literal['cumpleanos','aniversario','otro'] in EventCreate/EventUpdate.
Frontend expo logs show non-blocking warnings: 'expo-notifications listening to push token changes not supported on web' and 'shadow*' deprecation -> 'boxShadow'. Inform main agent for cleanup later.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 511 lines — approaching the 700-line guidance limit. Consider splitting into modules (auth, events, reviews, settings) when adding more features.
Cascade on event delete correctly removes flashcards and prompt_log. Good.
MongoDB _id is properly excluded everywhere via projection {'_id': 0}.
Indexes are created on startup including TTL on user_sessions.expires_at — good.
Pydantic Field constraints used correctly (ge/le for day, month, hour, minute).
seed_data_creation: Seeded MongoDB user_TEST_recuerda_001 + session_token TEST_token_recuerda_abc123 via conftest.py autouse session-scoped fixture. Cleanup performed at session teardown (users, user_sessions, events, flashcards, prompt_log, settings filtered by TEST user_id).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use /app/backend/tests/conftest.py which seeds TEST_token_recuerda_abc123 for user_TEST_recuerda_001. Run: cd /app/backend && python -m pytest tests/ -v. BASE_URL is from EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. All endpoints behave as specified in PRD.
rca_of_issue: No bugs found. SM-2 algorithm correctly: grade=2 (Good) on a fresh card (reps=0, interval=0) moves interval to 1 day and removes it from today's due queue. Grade=0 (Again) resets reps and sets interval=1. Calendar prompts use date(year, month, day) with leap-year fallback (Feb 29 -> 28). prompt_log dedupe by (user_id, event_id, kind, date) verified working.
